vocab.meaning: những thứ tối thiểu, thiết yếu nhất
vocab.example: I prefer not to be weighed down, so I typically only carry the bare essentials like my keys and phone.
Given how much I rely on navigation apps, a portable power bank is a permanent fixture in my bag.

vocab.meaning: giá trị về mặt tình cảm
vocab.example: I always keep a small lucky charm in my wallet; it has no practical use but immense sentimental value.

vocab.meaning: cồng kềnh, nặng nề (thường chỉ đồ vật)
vocab.example: I’ve recently swapped my clunky old camera for a mirrorless one to make my outings more comfortable.

vocab.meaning: bộ dụng cụ sát khuẩn (nước rửa tay, khăn giấy ướt)
vocab.example: Since the pandemic, carrying a compact sanitizing kit has become an ingrained habit for me.

vocab.meaning: vật chứa có thể tái sử dụng (bình nước, túi đi chợ)
vocab.example: As an eco-conscious person, I never leave home without a reusable receptacle for my coffee or water.

vocab.meaning: đồ đạc lỉnh kỉnh (liên quan đến một hoạt động cụ thể)
vocab.example: If I'm heading to a sketch session, I’ll bring along all my artistic paraphernalia, including charcoals and pads.

vocab.meaning: được cất kỹ, giấu kín (trong túi hoặc ngăn nhỏ)
vocab.example: I always keep a spare house key tucked away in a hidden compartment of my backpack for emergencies.

vocab.meaning: do thói quen, theo thói quen
vocab.example: I still carry a physical notebook out of habit, even though I could easily take notes on my smartphone.

vocab.meaning: giảm nhẹ gánh nặng (đồ đạc mang theo)
vocab.example: To lighten the load during long walks, I’ve started using digital versions of all my membership cards.
